assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 searches for preemptive tasks using JQL with labels 'security-preemptive' and 'CVE-2026-55123' (§1.60)
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md line 8: JQL query is 'project = TC AND issuetype = Task AND labels = 'security-preemptive' AND labels = 'CVE-2026-55123' ORDER BY created DESC' -- both required labels are present in the search.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 filters results to match the current stream (rhtpa-2.1) by checking the task summary for the stream name
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 23-25: 'Current issue TC-8021 stream suffix: [rhtpa-2.1] -> stream rhtpa-2.1' and 'TC-8022 summary contains (rhtpa-2.1) -> matches the current issue's stream'. Filtering is performed by checking the task summary for the stream name.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 links the new CVE Jira TC-8021 to the preemptive task TC-8022 with 'Depend' link type (standard remediation linkage)
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 36-40: 'jira.create_link(inwardIssue: TC-8021, outwardIssue: TC-8022, type: "Depend")'. The link type is 'Depend' and described as 'standard remediation linkage'.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 removes the 'security-preemptive' label from TC-8022 — the task is now a standard remediation task linked to a proper CVE Jira
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 49-56: jira.edit_issue updates TC-8022 labels to ['ai-generated-jira', 'Security', 'CVE-2026-55123'] -- 'security-preemptive' is removed. Line 58 confirms: 'TC-8022 is no longer a preemptive task -- it is now a standard remediation task linked to its own stream's CVE Jira.'

assertion_results.text: Step 8 skips remediation task creation for this stream because Step 4.4 reconciliation already linked an existing task
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md lines 22-23: 'Step 8 -- Remediation Task Creation: SKIPPED. Step 8 skips remediation task creation for stream rhtpa-2.1 because Step 4.4 reconciliation already linked an existing remediation task (TC-8022) to the CVE Jira.' Also reconciliation.md line 76: 'Step 8 will skip task creation for this stream.'
